prompt:
STYLE-LOCKED GENERATION: the attached reference image is the ONLY authority for visual style.
Copy from the reference: line weight, ink/wall color, paper tone and texture, sketch looseness, door swing arcs, window marks, and overall illustration language.
Do NOT copy from the reference: room geometry, wall topology, furniture layout, or any text/labels.
Draw a brand-new top-down floor plan that follows ONLY the layout data below.

Written style notes (must agree with the reference; use as checklist):
- Use thick, hand-painted orange brush strokes for exterior walls with uneven edges  
- Draw interior walls with thinner, solid black lines, uniform in thickness  
- Render doors and windows with thin, precise black lines and semi-transparent fill for window glass  
- Depict door swing arcs with dashed black lines, slightly rough and hand-drawn  
- Apply a subtle beige watercolor paper texture as background with visible grain and slight color variation  
- Scatter black ink splatters and brush marks randomly for a distressed, worn effect  
- Use minimal shading, relying on textured background and ink marks rather than hatching or gradients  
- Represent door swings with single line arcs connecting to door edges, open inward and outward distinctively  
- Keep all linework freehand with slight imperfections, avoiding perfect straight lines or mechanical precision  
- Use no additional colors beyond black and orange for lines and structural elements

Layout data (authoritative geometry):
Room metadata: id=room-402, type=Deluxe Suite, width=900, height=900
Items JSON: [{"id":"item-bed","type":"bed","label":"King Bed","x":110,"y":620,"width":220,"height":160},{"id":"item-sofa","type":"sofa","label":"Sofa","x":510,"y":560,"width":230,"height":120},{"id":"item-table","type":"table","label":"Coffee Table","x":545,"y":455,"width":110,"height":80},{"id":"item-fridge","type":"fridge","label":"Mini Fridge","x":160,"y":220,"width":70,"height":70},{"id":"item-sink","type":"sink","label":"Sink","x":270,"y":210,"width":85,"height":55}]

Output constraints:
- top-down orthographic view (no perspective / isometric)
- include all items with approximately correct relative sizes and positions
- keep the drawing readable and uncluttered
- no text labels in the final image
